About.title: About MossGap
About.subtitle: A cozy corner of the internet for browser games. We curate, you play.
About.missionBody: We believe great games should be one click away. No downloads, no installers, no friction - just open a page and start playing. MossGap brings together a handpicked collection of browser games that run anywhere, on any device, in seconds.
About.storyBody: MossGap started as a weekend project to make browser games easier to discover and play. Every game loads fast no matter where you are, on any device. We're a small team obsessed with playtime - and we're just getting started.
About.feature1Desc: No downloads. No installs. Click and play - games run right in your browser.
About.feature2Desc: Every game is reviewed and sandboxed. Your data stays yours, always.
About.feature3Desc: We handpick each title. No filler, no clutter - just games worth your time.
About.feature4Desc: Desktop, tablet, phone - any device with a modern browser can join the fun.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: How we handle your data at MossGap.
Privacy.section1Body:
At MossGap, we are committed to protecting your privacy. We collect the minimum information needed to provide you with the best gaming experience:
- Game preferences and high scores (stored locally in your browser)
- Language preference
- Theme preference (dark/light mode)
- Anonymous usage analytics to improve our games
Privacy.section2Body:
We use the information we collect to:
- Provide and maintain our game services
- Improve user experience and game performance
- Remember your preferences across browsing sessions
- Analyze usage patterns to improve our games
Privacy.section3Body: Your game data is primarily stored locally on your device using your browser's localStorage. We do not store personal information on our servers. We implement appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access.
Privacy.section4Body:
Our website may use third-party services for analytics:
- Google Analytics (for anonymous usage statistics)
- These services may collect anonymous data according to their own privacy policies
Privacy.section5Body:
We use cookies and local storage to enhance your experience:
- Essential cookies required for website functionality
- Preference cookies to remember your settings
- Analytics cookies to understand usage patterns
- You can control cookies through your browser settings
Privacy.section6Body: Our games are suitable for all ages. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent and believe your child has provided personal information, please contact us.
Privacy.section7Body:
You have the right to:
- Clear your game data and preferences at any time
- Disable cookies in your browser
- Request information about the data we collect
- Contact us about privacy concerns
Privacy.section8Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify users of any significant changes by posting the new policy on this page.
Privacy.section9Body:
If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us:
- Email: support@mossgap.com
- Contact form: Visit our Contact page

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about playing games on MossGap.

items.question: What is MossGap?
items.answer: MossGap is a browser-game arcade where you can play high-quality titles - from classic puzzles and strategy games to arcade action - entirely in your browser. Every game is free and needs no download.

items.question: Why should I pick MossGap?
items.answer: We pair a clean, responsive interface with multi-language and dark-mode support, and we handpick every title. The focus is on fast load times, a smooth experience, and games that run well on whatever device you have.

items.question: Are the games really free?
items.answer: Yes - every game on MossGap is 100% free. No sign-up, no downloads, no hidden charges. Just open a game and start playing right away.

items.question: Does MossGap work on phones and tablets?
items.answer: Yes. All our games are optimized for desktop and mobile, so whether you're on a phone, tablet, or laptop, the gameplay stays smooth thanks to our responsive layout.

items.question: Where are my scores and progress stored?
items.answer: Your scores and progress are saved to your browser's local storage, so they carry over between sessions on the same device - no account needed.

items.question: What kinds of games can I play?
items.answer: Our catalog spans action, puzzle, arcade, adventure, strategy, sports, and racing - and we keep adding new titles so there's always something fresh to try.

items.question: Do I need an account to play?
items.answer: Nope - just hit play. The trade-off is that scores and progress live only on your current device, since we don't store them on a server.

items.question: Which browsers are supported?
items.answer: MossGap runs on all modern browsers - Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. For the best experience, keep your browser up to date.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: The rules of the playground.
Terms.section1Body: By accessing MossGap, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you don't agree, please don't use the site.
Terms.section2Body: MossGap is provided for personal, non-commercial entertainment. You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to disrupt it, or reverse-engineer any part of the platform.
Terms.section3Body: Games on MossGap are submitted by creators or sourced from public domains. We review each submission but cannot guarantee the accuracy or safety of third-party content.
Terms.section4Body: The MossGap platform, including its design and brand, is protected by intellectual property laws. Game content remains the property of their respective creators.
Terms.section5Body: MossGap is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the service.
Terms.section6Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of MossGap after changes means you accept the updated terms.
